constituents: Notodanthonia nigricans contains a variety of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The flavonoids present in Notodanthonia nigricans have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The phenolic acids in the plant have been found to have antimicrobial and antidiabetic properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the active constituents and potential health benefits of Notodanthonia nigricans.
